ads.title: Brand introduction
primary_text:
Confluence Financial Partners invites you to an intimate evening at J Alexander's in Naples.

Wednesday, June 18 at 6:00 PM.

Brandon Beck — Wealth Manager — will guide a conversation designed to bring clarity to the financial decisions that matter most right now.

Topics for the evening:
→ Retirement income strategy and withdrawal planning
→ Estate coordination and legacy considerations
→ Tax-efficient wealth management
→ Aligning your financial plan with your goals

Complimentary dinner and cocktails. Seating is limited to ensure a meaningful experience.

Your financial life touches many dimensions — investments, estate plans, tax strategy, and the legacy you intend to leave. When these areas are addressed together, each decision can carry more purpose.

Confluence Financial Partners is hosting an evening in Naples to explore these connections.

Wednesday, June 18 at 6:00 PM at J Alexander's.

Brandon Beck — Wealth Manager — will lead an intimate conversation over complimentary dinner and cocktails.

Seating is limited.

An evening in Naples designed for thoughtful conversation about your financial future.

Brandon Beck — Wealth Manager at Confluence Financial Partners — will be joined by a small group of guests for dinner at J Alexander's.

Wednesday, June 18 at 6:00 PM.

The evening will focus on retirement planning considerations, estate coordination, and the kinds of questions worth asking at this stage of wealth.

Complimentary dinner and cocktails. Seating is limited.

ads.title: Topic preview
primary_text:
Your portfolio, estate plan, and tax strategy all influence each other — but they are often managed in separate conversations.

Brandon Beck — Wealth Manager at Confluence Financial Partners — is hosting an intimate dinner in Naples to explore how these areas can work together.

Wednesday, June 18 at 6:00 PM at J Alexander's.

The evening covers:
→ Coordinating retirement income with tax strategy
→ Estate planning that reflects your family's values
→ Aligning your investments with your long-term goals

Complimentary dinner and cocktails. Seating is limited.

What does your financial plan look like when all the pieces are considered together?

Join Brandon Beck — Wealth Manager — for an evening at J Alexander's in Naples designed to explore the connections between your portfolio, estate plan, tax approach, and the legacy you intend to build.

Wednesday, June 18 at 6:00 PM.

Complimentary dinner and cocktails. Seating is limited.

Retirement planning. Estate coordination. Tax strategy. Legacy.

Each of these areas deserves thoughtful attention — and each one affects the others. An evening at J Alexander's in Naples will bring them together.

Brandon Beck — Wealth Manager at Confluence Financial Partners — will guide the conversation.

Wednesday, June 18 at 6:00 PM. Complimentary dinner and cocktails. Seating is limited.

ads.title: Brandon Beck spotlight
primary_text:
Brandon Beck — Wealth Manager at Confluence Financial Partners — works with families navigating the intersection of retirement planning, estate coordination, and tax-efficient wealth management.

He is hosting an intimate dinner in Naples to share perspectives on the financial considerations that matter most at this stage of life.

Wednesday, June 18 at 6:00 PM at J Alexander's.

An evening of thoughtful conversation, complimentary dinner, and cocktails. Seating is limited.

Meet Brandon Beck — Wealth Manager at Confluence Financial Partners.

Brandon works with families across the country who are approaching or navigating retirement, coordinating estate plans, and seeking clarity on how their financial decisions fit together.

He would like to invite you to an intimate dinner at J Alexander's in Naples.

Wednesday, June 18 at 6:00 PM. Complimentary. Seating is limited.

When financial planning is coordinated thoughtfully, each decision can reinforce the ones around it. Your retirement income strategy, estate plan, and tax approach are connected — and the right conversation can help bring that into focus.

Brandon Beck — Wealth Manager at Confluence Financial Partners — is hosting an evening in Naples to explore these connections.

Wednesday, June 18 at J Alexander's. Complimentary dinner and cocktails. Seating is limited.

ads.title: Retirement coordination
primary_text:
Your portfolio, estate plan, and tax strategy each carry weight on their own. But the real impact often comes from how they work together — especially during retirement.

Are your income distributions aligned with your tax approach? Does your estate plan reflect your current family circumstances? Are you positioned for the kind of legacy you intend to leave?

Join Brandon Beck for an evening in Naples exploring how coordination across these areas can help bring clarity to the decisions ahead.

Wednesday, June 18 at J Alexander's. Complimentary dinner and cocktails. Seating is limited.

The years leading into and through retirement carry decisions that can shape your financial life for decades. Income strategy. Estate documents. Tax positioning. Charitable giving. Each area deserves attention — and they are more connected than they may appear.

Confluence Financial Partners is hosting an intimate dinner in Naples to explore how thoughtful coordination across these areas can help strengthen your overall plan.

Wednesday, June 18 at 6:00 PM at J Alexander's. Complimentary. Seating is limited.

A well-coordinated financial plan considers more than any single piece in isolation. When your retirement income, estate plan, tax approach, and investment strategy work together, each decision can carry more purpose.

Brandon Beck — Wealth Manager at Confluence Financial Partners — is hosting a dinner in Naples focused on these connections.

Wednesday, June 18 at J Alexander's. Complimentary dinner and cocktails. Seating is limited.
headline: Are the Pieces Working Together?
Coordination That Can Make a Difference

ads.title: Intimate setting
primary_text:
For families who call Southwest Florida home, the financial considerations of this chapter of life deserve a thoughtful conversation — not a lecture.

Confluence Financial Partners is hosting an intimate dinner at J Alexander's in Naples for a small group of guests to explore the topics that matter most: retirement income, estate coordination, tax strategy, and legacy planning.

Brandon Beck — Wealth Manager — will guide the evening.

Wednesday, June 18 at 6:00 PM. Complimentary dinner and cocktails. A few seats remain.

This is not a seminar. It is a dinner.

Brandon Beck — Wealth Manager at Confluence Financial Partners — is hosting an intimate evening at J Alexander's in Naples for a small group of guests. The conversation will focus on retirement planning, estate coordination, and the financial considerations that deserve more than a phone call.

Wednesday, June 18. Complimentary dinner and cocktails. A few seats remain.

Confluence Financial Partners serves families across the country who have built meaningful wealth and seek clarity about what comes next.

For those in Southwest Florida, an evening at J Alexander's in Naples offers the opportunity to explore retirement income strategy, estate planning, and tax considerations in a setting designed for real conversation.

Wednesday, June 18 at 6:00 PM. Brandon Beck hosting. Complimentary. A few seats remain.
